Verified Petition For (1) Order Confirming Real Property To Trust; (2) Order Conveying Personal Property To Trust And For 859 Damages; (3) Cancellation Of Instruments; (4) Money Had And Received; (5) Financial Elder Abuse; And (6) Undue Influence
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For (1) Order Confirming Real Property To Trust; (2) Order Conveying Personal Property To Trust And For 859 Damages; (3) Cancellation Of Instruments; (4) Money Had And Received; (5) Financial Elder Abuse; And (6) Undue Influence
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Continued To Jan-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Sarah Brooks appeared by zoom for Jonathan Ow (petitioner).
Melissa Schmitt appeared by zoom for Kelsey Stiles (successor trustee).
Jason Louie (proposed guardian ad litem) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Parties stated that they reached a settlement agreement, that Mr. Louie received it on Friday and is still reviewing but will have it signed soon, and that Ms. Brooks anticipates on filing an Ex Parte Petition for Settlement and include the discharge of Mr. Louie. Matter is continued to January 6, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Appointment Of A Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Sep-06-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sarah Brooks appeared by zoom for Jonathan Ow (petitioner).
Melissa Schmitt appeared by zoom for and with Kelsey Stiles (current acting trustee) by zoom.
Jason Louie (proposed guardian ad litem) appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Wing Shing Cho (son of respondent Shiu Biu Cho) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Louie stated that he has not had the opportunity to meet with Shiu Biu Cho. The court stated that it does not have a lot of information regarding Mr. Cho's status other than the representations that were made at the last hearing by Mr. Koplowitz and Wing Shing Cho, and asked Mr. Louie if he feels it is sufficient to appoint him. Mr. Louie stated that he believes so and that if he sees that Mr. Cho has capacity, he will report it to the court right away. Mrs. Brooks and Mrs. Schmitt stated that they do not object to the court appointing Mr. Louie as the guardian ad litem. Mrs. Brooks informed the court that Mary Ow passed away on August 6th, stated that her client filed a petition for probate in San Mateo County which she believes has a hearing date of October 8th and that Mr. Louie may have to represent Shiu Biu Cho in that case as well. Mrs. Brooks also stated that she served a subpoena on Adult Protective Services and a couple of other subpoenas as well, that she will confer with Mr. Louie and provide him with copies, and that she will be filing a summary adjudication motion on the real properties. Status on the appointment of a guardian ad litem is off calendar as the court will appoint Mr. Louie. The Verified Petition for Order Confirming Real Property to Trust, etc. is continued to November 4, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Verified Petition For (1) Order Confirming Real Property To Trust; (2) Order Conveying Personal Property To Trust And For 859 Damages; (3) Cancellation Of Instruments; (4) Money Had And Received; (5) Financial Elder Abuse; And (6) Undue Influence
Off Calendar Sep-06-2024 Continued To Nov-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For (1) Order Confirming Real Property To Trust; (2) Order Conveying Personal Property To Trust And For 859 Damages; (3) Cancellation Of Instruments; (4) Money Had And Received; (5) Financial Elder Abuse; And (6) Undue Influence
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Continued To Sep-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sarah Brooks appeared by zoom for and with Jonathan Ow (trustee) by zoom.
Melissa Schmitt appeared by zoom for and with Kelsey Stiles (current acting trustee) by zoom.
Bruce Feder (court appointed counsel) appeared by zoom for Mary Ow (beneficiary).
Edward Koplowitz specially appearing for Vincent Cho (son of respondent Shiu Biu Cho).

The court noted that there is no appearance by the respondent. Mr. Koplowitz stated that the respondent is 86 years of age, that he has a number of medical issues, that he resides in a rehabilitation/nursing home in Madera, and spoke of a neuropsych examination and the respondent having no capacity to make medical decisions. Mr. Koplowitz also raised the issue of the respondent not having the capacity to hire counsel, the issue of having either a conservatorship or guardian ad litem appointed, the issue of venue and requested a 30 to a 45-day continuance to allow the son to find a guardian ad litem for the father. The court stated that it is satisfied that this would be the proper venue. Mrs. Brooks stated that she does not want this to be stalled, raised the issue of the court having authority to appoint guardian ad litem under Probate Code 1003, and stated that she is comfortable with the requested continuance and that she intends to proceed with discovery. Mr. Feder stated that he has no view. The court stated that it would rather allow the parties to select a guardian ad litem. The Verified Amended Petition for Order Confirming Real Property to Trust. etc, is continued to September 6, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (special set). Status on the appointment of a guardian ad litem is also set for September 6, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
